summary: Bug fix verification completed. Both reported bugs are FIXED and working correctly. Bug #1 (Form-filling error) - Session ID now initialized on component mount, form-filling flow works. Bug #2 (Document upload failed) - Frontend now calls both document-scan AND profile/{id}/document endpoints, documents save to profile successfully.
passed_tests: ✅ Bug Fix #1: Form-filling flow - Session ID initialized on component mount (line 167)
✅ Bug Fix #1: Form-filling API works with valid session_id
✅ Bug Fix #1: Consent flow (YES) starts form at Step 1/12
✅ Bug Fix #1: Form progress bar shows correctly (8% at step 1)
✅ Bug Fix #1: Form Mode indicator visible in UI
✅ Bug Fix #2: Document upload calls document-scan endpoint
✅ Bug Fix #2: Document upload calls profile/{id}/document endpoint
✅ Bug Fix #2: Document saved to profile with Document ID
✅ Bug Fix #2: Document appears in profile documents list via API
✅ Bug Fix #2: AI extraction works - extracted full_name, date_of_birth from test image
✅ Service selector shows all available services
✅ Chat functionality works with AI responses
critical_code_review_comments: Session ID initialization fix at line 167 is correct - generates unique session ID on component mount
Document upload fix at lines 583-593 correctly calls profile/{id}/document endpoint after document-scan
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test profiles during bug verification testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both reported bugs are fixed. Form-filling flow works with session ID initialized on mount. Document upload saves to profile correctly. Test profiles created during testing can be used for future tests.

bug_1_form_filling_error.original_issue: Session ID was null when form-filling started, causing 'Sorry, there was an error' message
bug_1_form_filling_error.fix_applied: Session ID now generated on component mount (line 167) before any form-filling operations
bug_1_form_filling_error.verification: Form-filling flow tested end-to-end: profile creation → service selection → consent (YES) → form starts at Step 1/12
bug_1_form_filling_error.evidence: Form progress bar shows 'Step 1/12 • 8%' and 'Filling form...' status

bug_2_document_upload_failed.original_issue: Document upload only called document-scan but never saved to profile
bug_2_document_upload_failed.fix_applied: Frontend now calls both document-scan AND profile/{id}/document endpoints (lines 560-593)
bug_2_document_upload_failed.verification: Document uploaded successfully with Document ID: UPLO-19930420-WER6-PASS-20260201-8BDCE0
bug_2_document_upload_failed.evidence: API verification shows document saved to profile with extracted data (full_name, date_of_birth)

api_endpoints_verified.POST /api/consular/create-profile: Working - creates profile with unique ID
api_endpoints_verified.POST /api/consular/form-filling: Working - handles consent flow and step-by-step form filling
api_endpoints_verified.POST /api/consular/document-scan: Working - extracts data from document images using AI
api_endpoints_verified.POST /api/consular/profile/{id}/document: Working - saves document to profile with validity tracking
api_endpoints_verified.GET /api/consular/profile/{id}/documents: Working - returns list of documents with summary

ui_elements_verified.Service selector: Working - shows all services with fees
ui_elements_verified.Form progress bar: Working - shows step count and percentage
ui_elements_verified.Form Mode indicator: Working - shows '📝 Form Mode' when active
